title: ScenarioResult
description: Output returned by the cashflow engine after a completed scenario run. All metric fields are engine-computed. The source field must always be 'model_runner'. Never populate these fields manually.

run_id.description: Unique engine run reference. Assigned by the engine on submission. Used to trace every output back to its official run.

scenario_id.description: The scenario this run corresponds to.

source.description: Must always be 'model_runner'. Any result without this value must not be treated as official.

executed_at.description: Timestamp when the engine completed the run (UTC ISO 8601).

outputs.description: Official engine output metrics. All values are engine-computed. Fields are engine-defined and may vary by engine version. Treat all values as [calculated] — never re-derive them.

equity_irr.description: [calculated] Equity internal rate of return as decimal (e.g. 0.142 = 14.2%).

aaa_size_pct.description: [calculated] AAA tranche size as fraction of total deal (e.g. 0.61).

wac.description: [calculated] Weighted average cost of liabilities as decimal.

oc_cushion_aaa.description: [calculated] OC cushion on the AAA test as decimal.

ic_cushion_aaa.description: [calculated] IC cushion on the AAA test as decimal.

equity_wal.description: [calculated] Equity weighted average life in years.

scenario_npv.description: [calculated] Scenario net present value in deal currency.

engine_warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings returned by the engine (e.g. assumption overrides, data gaps).

engine_errors.description: Errors returned by the engine. If non-empty, outputs may be incomplete.

_mock.description: Present only on mock stub outputs. Value: 'MOCK_ENGINE_OUTPUT'. If this field exists, the result is NOT official and must not be presented as such.
